title: Finger This
content:
I'm practice [fingering][1] (video) everything I see in order to get accustomed with all the [iPhone][2] gestures. By the time I manage to get my hand on one, I should be quite proficient already.

That's ..umm.. 6-10 more months?

And congrats to all of you who made it out of the Apple store (or super suck AT&T store) with the iPhone. I'm jealous. :P

(I know .. Hype. What kind of geek would I be if I don't HYPE AROUND with other geeks?)

[1]: http://movies.apple.com/movies/us/apple/iphone/2007/tips/iphone-tip-compilation_560x316.mov
[2]: http://www.apple.com/iphone/
